title: Format Java Response v0
description: Studio-IDE-14 (#256): response body for `POST /api/v0/format/java`. On success the BFF returns FormatJavaResponse; on failure it returns FormatJavaError with a stable `code` discriminator the Studio renders into either a transient "Formatter unavailable" toast or a "Could not format" notice. Governed by ADR 0006 (Studio-BFF Contract Versioning).

formattedContent.description: Formatted Java source. Studio applies it as a single atomic edit so the format is one undo step.

code.description: Stable discriminator. `format_unavailable` and `format_upstream_error` map to a transient toast; `format_parse_error` surfaces a non-blocking notice; `format_input_invalid` and `format_input_too_large` are programmer-level guardrails.

line.description: 1-indexed source line of a parse error, when google-java-format pinpoints it.

column.description: 1-indexed source column of a parse error, when google-java-format pinpoints it.
